title: Hyperliquid’s Valantis, modular exchange protocol
summary_title: Volantis: Building Embedded Liquidity and Yield Strategies on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Volantis founders explain their modular yield vaults, LST strategies earning 8% APY, and vision for efficient DeFi on Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces Volantis team and Hyperliquid Community Hackathon
Ali and Dev introduce themselves; Volantis launched on Hyperliquid in early 2024
Ali describes Volantis as embedded liquidity and market-making solutions for yield generation
Dev explains modular protocol foundation enabling multiple yield strategies and swaps
Discussion of yield strategies: 8% APY on staking, arbitrage opportunities, leveraged yield loops
Ali and Dev discuss onboarding institutions and retail to Volantis vaults via improved UX
Dev outlines roadmap: Athena pool in months, delta-neutral strategies, tokenized yield products
Ali and Dev closing thoughts on Hyperliquid's unique moat as composable perp DEX with EVM
